rationale: Consolidates four CI workflows under `.github/workflows/` as the PR body describes. `ci-global.yml`: collapses seven jobs (`lint-yaml`, `lint-json`, `lint-markdown`, `lint-python`, `lint-shell`, `lint-repo-structure`, `resumen`) into a single `lint` job with sequential `::group::`-wrapped steps (yamllint, JSON validation via `python -m json.tool`, ruff, `python validar_repo.py --strict`, plus advisory shellcheck and markdownlint with `|| true`). `pr-guardian.yml`: merges five jobs (`conventional-title`, `pr-size`, `protected-files`, `changelog-check`, `placeholder-check`) into one `guardian` job; the title regex moves to the `PR_TITLE` env (correctly avoiding injection) and each subcheck still runs sequentially with its own group label. `security-scan.yml`: combines `detect-secrets`, `gitignore-check`, and `trufflehog` into a single `security` job; the inline `python3 << 'PYEOF'` regex scanner is preserved verbatim. `validar-todos.yml`: similarly collapsed. Each individual check retains its semantics, advisory lints remain non-blocking, and the PR body honestly disclosed that three of the four consolidated checks fail due to pre-existing issues on `main` rather than the consolidation itself. Net -93 lines of workflow YAML. Closed-without-merge does not imply broken; this is a clean refactor.
